turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hi, yeh Sunrise Clinic hai na? Main ek appointment book karna chahta hoon ophthalmology ke liye.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Haan ji, yeh Sunrise Multispeciality Clinic hai. Aapka naam aur contact number?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Theek hai Suresh ji. Dr. Manisha Rane eye specialist hain humare yahan. Is week koi bhi din chalega aapko?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Kal — matlab Budhwaar — agar ho toh.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Kal Budhwaar ko Dr. Rane 10 AM se 1 PM available hain. 11 AM ka slot khaali hai abhi.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Done! Suresh Bhosale, Budhwaar 11:00 AM, Dr. Manisha Rane. Aapko SMS aayega. Kuch aur?
